subject: Competitive Edge Features We Should Consider
body_text:
Hey Elie,

Been thinking about ways we can stay ahead of the competition in the AI scribe space. Here are some feature ideas that could give us a real edge:

**Real-Time Clinical Decision Support**
• AI-powered alerts for drug interactions, allergy conflicts, or missing preventive care during documentation
• Most competitors just transcribe - we could actively help improve patient care

**Specialty-Specific Templates & Workflows**
• Custom documentation templates for cardiology, dermatology, oncology, etc.
• Pre-built clinical pathways that guide documentation for complex cases

**Multi-Language Patient Interaction**
• Real-time translation during patient encounters
• Generate notes in English even when consultation was in Spanish/other languages

**Predictive Analytics Dashboard**
• Risk stratification scores embedded in notes
• Population health insights for practices
• Revenue cycle optimization suggestions

**Advanced Integration Capabilities**
• Two-way sync with imaging systems (PACS)
• Lab result auto-population into notes
• Telemedicine platform integrations beyond the basics

Thoughts? Any of these resonate with what you're seeing in the market?

Let's chat about prioritization when you have a few minutes.

Best,
Alex
